title: Postponement of the General Election to the GHADC until further orders
Aizawl district chhunga Progress Partners 126 te hnenah Handholding scheme hnuaia CM’s Special package Grant Phase-II  semna hun  leh briefing programme  hman a ni
content:
4790/2025-2026

Aizawl; the 11th March, 2026: Vawiin  chawhnu khan Aizawl DC Pisapui Hall-ah Aizawl DC office buatsaihin Bana kaih ( Hand holding) scheme hnuaia CM's  Special Package  Grant phase -II semna leh briefing Programme hman a ni a.  Pi Baryl Vanneihsangi,Aizawl south -III bialtu MLA chuan khuallian niin  hun a hmanpuia, CM’s special package  grant phase-II , progress partners te hnenah certificate leh Sign Board a sem nghal bawk a ni.

He hunah  hian thu sawiin, Pi Baryl-i chuan mihring hi mithiam te sawi danin, kan ngaihtuahna 70% aia tam luahtu   hian min kaihhruai thin a. Chuvangin vawiina progress partners te  chuan ‘kan sum dawn hi a tam lem lova,  engmah kan ni pui lovang’ tih zawnga ngaihtuahna kal tir lova, he tanpuina sum kan dawn hi tam lua lo mahse, engemaw zawng tal chuan kan hlawhtlinpui ngei ang’ tih zawnga ngaihtuahna in sen chuan in hlawhtlinpui ngei ka beisei tlat a.  CM’s Special package diltu tam tak zingah,  sawrkarin hlawhtlinna kawng zawh dun pui tura a  rin ngam progress partners thlanchhuah te in ni a, rinawmna, chhelna leh taimakna nen he tanpuina sum hi  a hmanna tur dik taka hmanga;  hlawhtlin pui ngei turin ka chah che u a, duhsakna ka hlan bawk a che u, a ti.

Vawiin  programme hi Zoramsiama Hmar,Addl.DC in kaihhruaiin,  Aizawl bawrhsap Er.Lalhriatpuia'n  keynote address sawina hun a hmang a. Pu Lalnghakliana, Research Officer in   CM’s Special package grant Phase –II  tanpuina  dawngtu tur  Progress partners te  thlanchhuah dan leh Progress partner te hriattur pawimawh hrang hrang sawina hun a hmang bawk. Vawiin programme-ah hian  Aizawl district chhunga   implementing department head of Office 4: DCIO, DVO, DHO leh DFDO ten an hmalak tawhna leh monitoring kalpui dan tur te report an pe  a. Progress partners te nen interaction  session hman nghal a ni.

CM’s Special package grant Phase-II progress partners te Department pali atanga thlan an ni a, Commerce & Industries Dept. atangin mi 58, AH& Vety Dept.  atangin mi 58, Horticulture Dept. atangin mi  8 leh Fisheries Dept. atangin  1  te an ni a. Tanpuina sum hi  installment a pe lovin, a vaiin vawikhatah  DBT  in  Progress partner te  Bank account-ah  thunsak vek an ni ang.  Progress partner  pakhat hnena  tanpuina sum  pek hi  ₹50,000 aia tam lo theuh a ni.

Vote of thanks sawiin Pi Laldinpuii DCIO in vawiin programme hi a kharta a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP IN SANGAU BLOCK LEVEL IMMUNIZATION TASK FORCE THUTKHAWM TELPUI
content:
4789/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, the 11th March, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 1:00 PM khan BDO, Sangau Office Chamber -ah Sangau Block Level Immunization Task Force Meeting neih niin Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan a telpui.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan member kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu sawina a nei hmasa a. Lawngtlai District hmasawnna kawngah chak zawka hmalak mek zel a nih thu sawiin, Foreigner dan lo va lo lut thin te khuahkhirh turin, Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) duan mek anih thu a tarlang. Lawngtlai khawpui chhung faina leh mawina (Beautification) ah pawh hmalak mek a nih thu a sawiin, Block Level- ah pawh kalpui a ni ang a ti. Bawrhsap chuan Immunization lamah 'Fully Immunized' ni thei tura hmalak mek zel a ni thu sawiin, medical lama thawktev pawh tan la thar zel turin a chah bawk a ni. Bawrhsap chuan PHC Sangau X-Ray Room siam a nih tur thu tarlangin, thawktu indaih lohna pawh a theih anga bawhzui a nih tur thu a sawi bawk.

Thutkhawm hi Pu Thomas Maratha Hlychho, BDO Sangau chuan kaihhruaiin Dr. S.Chunglala, Medical Officer, PHC Sangauin report pe in tun dinhmun ah Sangau, Pangkhua, Cheural, Rawlbuk leh Lungtian chhungah 96.44℅ Immunization MR - 2 ah an dinhmun niin Meeting hmasa leh tun meeting inkarah Zero Doser -3 pek thar anih thu ngaihthlak niin, tun dinhmunah Vaccine la duh lo 16 an awm mek thu a tarlang a ni.

Thutkhawm ah hian vaccine la duh lo te bikah ANM, Health Workers leh Asha Workers - ten 'home visit' nei nise tih a ni a. Thawktu indaih lohna avanga an harsatna tawhte pawh chinfel thuai ni se an ti bawk a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawm ah hian Dr.PC Vanlalhlui,, WHO Consultant, Lawngtlai, Dr.Zoliana Valte, Medical Officer, S.Lungpher leh Lalnunhlimi,EM WHO, K Lalbiaktluangi, Health Superviser leh VC aiawh te an tel ani.

Attachment

title: SIAHA-AH CM SPECIAL PACKAGE 2nd PHASE PROGRESS PARTNER TE TAN TRAINING NEIH A NI A, CERTIFICATE SEM NGHAL A NI
content:
4788/2025-2026

Dated Siaha, the 11 March, 2026:Vawiiin chawhnu dar 2:00PM khan DRDO Conference hall, DC Complex, Siahaah Chief Minister Special Package 2nd Phase-a progress partner-te tan orientation training neih a ni a, Pu Abraham Beirazi Khithie, Additional DC chuan a hmanpui a, certificate a sem nghal.

Thu sawiin Pu Abraham Beirazi Khithie chuan kal khawmte chu Mizoram sawrkar flagship programme pawimawh tak Chief Minister Special Package 2nd Phase-a progress partner tura thlan an ni chu a lawmpui thu a sawi hmasa a, ‘Sawrkarin ṭanpui tlaka a ngaih tam tak zinga a thlan chhuah nalh annih ang ngeiin hlawhtlinpui ngei tum turin a chah bawk.’ Hmasawnna hna thawhna tur dawngtute’n ṭangkai taka an hmana hlawhtlinna an chan chuan chhungkaw tam zawk tan kawng hawngtu an ni thei a, phase dang lo awm lehzel turah sawrkarin ṭanpui tlaka an ngaih ni tur chuan tuna mite an pawihmawh a ni, a ti.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian AH&Vety department hnuaia Chief Minister Special Package 2nd Phase-a progress partner tura thlan mi sawmpahnih (12) an tel a. CM Special package dawngtute hlawhtlinna hlimthla thlirho hmasak niin, ‘Financial literacy, leadership training & work ethics’ tih hmangin Dr. H. Lalruatfela, VO, AH&Vety department in thu a sawi a, Dr. Benson Chhakchhuak, VO AH&Vety department in ‘hand holding scheme overview, motivation, technical training’ hmangin a zirtir a, zawhna leh chhanna hun hman a ni bawk.

Pu Vanlalchhuanliana, Member Secretary, District Management Committee leh SDO (S) nibawk chuan hun hman a kaihruai a. Chief Minister Special Package 1st Phase-ah progress partner turin Siaha district aṭangin mi 35 thlan an nih thu leh 2nd phase-ah AH&Vety department aṭang vekin mi 12 thlan an nih thu a sawi. Dr. H. Lalzarliana, DVO, AH&Vety department-in lawmthu sawina a nei a, hun hman tihtawp a ni.

Attachment

title: Saitualah CM Special Package (Phase-II)-a progress partner te tan training buatsaih
content:
4787/2025-2026

Saitual, the 11th March, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Saitualah Pi Christina Lalnunfeli, SDC kaihhruainain CM Special Package (Phase-II)-a progress partner te tan training buatsaih a ni a, Pu Tharun Patnaik Madala, SDO (S) chu khuallian niin certificate leh placard te a sem nghal a ni.

He hunah hian khuallian Pu Tharun Patnaik Madala chuan progress partner te chu an hun hlu tak senga training an rawn kal avangin lawmthu a sawi a, line department te pawh an inpekna chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi. Khuallian chuan progress partner te chu an sum dawn te a hmanna tur dik taka hmang turin a fuih a, an hlawhtlinpui ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiin inkhawm hi Pi Christina Lalnunfeli chuan kaihruaiin, Pu Tharun Patnaik Madala, SDO (S) chu khuallian niin thu a sawi a, certificate leh placard semna hun hman nghal a ni bawk. Pu C. Christopher Lalhriatpuia, District Lead Resource Person, DIC, DRDO chuan “Introduction to Entrepreneurship & Basic Business Management” tih thupui hmangin mahni kutkawih eizawnna leh sumdawnna chungchang a sawi zau a, Pu PC. Lallawmkima, Account Officer, DRDO chuan sum leh pai vawn that dan ‘Basic bookkeeping’ chungchangah zirtirna a pe bawk a ni.

CM Special Package (Phase-II)-ah hian Saitual District-ah department pahnih- Horticulture leh AH & Vety hnuaiaah progress partner pahnih thlan chhuah an ni a, vawiin chawhma lamah hian line department te chuan an trait thlan theuhah te progress partner te hi technical training an pe a ni. CM special package atanga sum fai (grant) te chu training neih zawhah hian progress partner te bank account-ah a lut ang.

title: VANTAWNG TOURISM PROJECT LEH TUIRIHIAU PROJECT CHUNGCHANG NGAIHTUAHIN IWRD LEH TOURISM DEPARTMENT HOTUTE THUKHAWM
content:
4786/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl the 11th March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Irrigation & Water Resource Department (IWRD) leh Tourism Department hotute chu Secretariat Conference Hall, MINECO-ah ‘Vantawng Tourism Project’ leh ‘Tuirihiau Project’ chungchang ngaihtuahin an thukhawm.

Thutkhawmna hi Pu Lalrothanga, Secretary, Irrigation & Water Resources Department chuan a kaihruai a. Thutkhawmnaah hian Vantawng, Tuirihiau leh Buangpui a Department pahnihte hmalakna tur Project Proposal zirchianna neih a ni a. Project pahnih ‘Vantawng View Aerial Ropeway & Associated infrastructure at Thenzawl & Buangpui’ tih leh ‘Vantawng-Tuirihiau Integrated Water Conservation and Eco-Tourism Project-te chu sawiho nghal a ni.

Heng bakah hian Project pahnihte’n an ken tel tur hmalakna hrang hrangte, Project kaihhnawih hmalaknate insut buai lohdan tur leh thawktute tanho dan tur ruahmannate siam nghal niin, Project- te chu mipui vantlangin tangkai zawka an chhawr theih dan turte pawh sawiho nghal a ni.

title: Zokhawthar Land Custom Station-ah Champhai Bawrhsapin ATM a hawng
content:
4785/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 11th March 2026:Vawiin khan Zokhawthar Land Custom Station-ah Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquin chuan SBI ATM thar a hawng a, a hawnna hunah khuallian a ni bawk a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan he ATM hawn theih nana hnathawh ropui tak avangin SBI leh C&I-a hnathawk zawng zawng te chungah lawmthu a sawi a, khaw hla tak taka awm te an ngai pawimawhin banking service an neih an duhsak tih a hriat a ni tih a sawi. Zokhawthar mipui te'n tangkai taka an hman theih nan duhsakna a hlan a, tha taka enkawl turin a fuih bawk a ni.

He hun hi District Commerce & Industries Officer Pu Vanlalpara'n hun a kaihruai a, SBI Regional Office Deputy Manager Pu H. Lallianzama chuan technical report a pe a. Zokhawthar VCP Pu Laldinthara leh VCP hmasa Pu Lalmuanpuia te'n thu tawi sawiin Zokhawthar mipuite aiawhin lawmthu an sawi a, SBI Lead District Manager Pu Lawmkima'n lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: Hmeichhia te tan a thlawna harsatna thlenna hun - "Maha Jan Sunwai”chu Hnahthial District-ah huaihawt a ni
content:
4784/2025-2026

Dated Hnahthial, the 11th March, 2026:International Women’s Day, 2026 denchhenin Mizoram State Commission for Women huaihawt, Hmeichhia harsatna tawkte tana Free Public Hearing - Mahila Jan Sunwai, chu Hnahthial District-ah neih a ni a. Hmeichhiate harsatna rang taka chinfel theihna tur a hun siam niin CDPO office Hnahthial-ah Public Hearing hi neih a ni. Pi Rebek Lalruatdiki Khiangte, Member Mizoram State Commission for Women in he hun hi hmanpuiin Addl. SP, Pu Robert S. Beihrosa leh District Legal Services Authority (DLSA) members - Pi Lalrindiki Ralte, Advocate leh Pi Rashmi Chhetry, Advocate te bakah Women and Child Development Department (WCD) thawktute he programme ah hian an tel a ni.

Pi Rebek Lalruatdiki chuan thusawina hun tawi hmangin Women's Commission din chhoh a nih dan te leh an hna thawhte sawi zauna a nei a. He programme tum ber chu hmeichhiaten hmeichhia an nihna anga in lam leh khawtlang nun hona kawng engah pawh harsatna an tawhte thlamuang taka an thlen theihna tur hmun him siam a nih thu a sawi a. Chung harsatna tawkte thu rawn thlen chu a thlawnin theih ang tawka chinfel chu an thil tum ber a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Hawnna programme hi Pi F. Lalnutluangi, CDPO chuan kaihruaiin Pi V. Ramtharnghaki, Centre Administrator, OSC bakah officials dangten he programme hi an hmanpui a ni.

Hearing neih chhung hian hmeichhia paruk (6) te hnen atangin complain dawn a ni a. Mi paruk (6) lo kal in a hmun leh hmunah mi pali (4) case te chu chinfel a ni a. A hmuna chilfel theih tak loh case pahnih te chu CWC leh DLSA lamah refer an ni bawk. Complain tam zawk hi hmeichhiate dikna chanvo rahbehsak te, maintenance dawn tur an dawn loh te, leh Child Custody chungchang te a ni a. Case nei kher lo te pawh hmeichhe humhim dan hre duh te hnenah Legal Counselling pek an ni.

Attachment

title: A review meeting was held by Mamit District Water and Sanitation Mission
content:
541/2025-2026

Dated: Mamit, the 11th of March 2026:A meeting of the District Water & Sanitation Mission (DWSM) was held today at the DC Conference Hall, Mamit, under the chiarmanship of Mrs.Carolyn L.B. Khiangte, Addl. Deputy Commissioner, Mamit district. During the meeting, the District Technical Unit (DTU) Review Module for Jal Seva Aankalan and the District Improvement Plan based on GP assessments were discussed and members of the DTU were also provided training on the Aankalan assessment process.

On the occasion, Mrs. Carolyn L.B. Khiangte, who chaired the meeting, inaugurated the Jal Mahotsav campaign, which will be observed from 8th March to 22nd March 2026.

Er. Helen Saibuangi, Executive Engineer, PHED Mamit WATSAN Division and Member-Secretary, DWSM, highlighted the activities of the mission including Jal Seva Aankalan, Jal Arpan Diwas, and the establishment of the District Technical Unit (DTU) to assist DWSM in various technical matters along with other initiatives.

As the upcoming World Water day falls on a Sunday, the committee agreed to observe it on the next day ie 23rd March, 2026.

Meanwhile, World Plumbing Day was observed today at the PHED Office, Mamit WATSAN Division, chaired by Er. Helen Saibuangi, Sr. Executive Engineer. During the programme, water distributors and line duty personnel were honoured in recognition of their dedicated service.

Attachment

title: Mamit District Water & Sanitation Mission (DWSM) an thukhawm
content:
4783/2025-2026

Dated : Mamit the 11th of March 2026 :Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit ah Pi Carolyn L.B. Khiangte, Addl. DC kaihhruainain, District Water & Sanitation Mission (DWSM) an thukhawm a, District Technical Unit review module for Jal Seva Aankalan leh District Improvement plan based on GP assessments te sawiho a ni a.DTU members te tan Aankalan assessment chungchangah training pek nghal an ni.

He hun kaihruaitu Pi Carolyn L.B Khiangte chuan March ni 8 atanga ni 22 chhunga hman tur, Jal Mahotsav campaign a hawng bawk.

PHED Mamit WATSAN Division EE leh Member - Secretary ni bawk Er. Helen Saibuangi chuan DWSM hnathawh hrang hrang - Jal Seva Ankalan kalpui a nih dan te, Jal Arpan Diwas hman a nih tawh thu te, DWSM technical thil chi hrang hranga pui tura District Technical Unit (DTU) din thu te leh hmalakna dang tam tak a tarlang a.

DWSM thukhawm chuan World Water day hman dan tur te sawi nghal niin, 22nd March,2026 hi Sunday anih avangin a tuk 23rd March,2026 a hman turin a rel a ni.

Vawiin vek hian Er. Helen Saibuangi, Sr. Executive Engineer, PHED, Mamit WATSAN Division kaihhruainain PHED office-ah World Plumbing day hman a ni a, he hunah tuisem leh line duty te chawimawina leh infuihtharna hun hman a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: Khawzawlah International Women’s Day pualin Mahila Jan Sunwai hmang
content:
4782/2025-2026

Dated Khawzawl, 11th March, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11 khan One Stop Centre (OSC), Zuchhip Veng, Khawzawlah International Women’s Day pualin Mahila Jan Sunwai hman niin hmeichhia harsatna tawk te tana Free Legal Public Hearing neih a ni a, Addl. DC Pu K. Zorammuana’n a hmanpui. He hun hi National Commission for Women, New Delhi leh, Mizoram State Commission for Women, Deputy Commissioner, Superintendent of Police, District Legal Services Authority leh Women & Child Development Department te nen tanghoa hman a ni.

He hun hi Pi Lalchhuanmawii, Member, Mizoram State Commission for Women (MSCW) in a kaihruai a, Addl. Deputy Commissioner, Pu K. Zorammuana, Pu Jerry Lalrinsanga, Deputy Superintendent of Police, Khawzawl, Pi Lalrinthangi, President, Sub- Hqrs MHIP leh Pu Lalchawiliana, Advocate, DLSA Champhai atangin thu sawi tha tak tak ngaihthlak a ni a, heng bakah hian Hmeichhia harsatna tawkte tan an harsatna ngaihthlakna hun Free legal Public Hearing neih nghal a ni bawk.

He hunah hian Hmeichhia dikna chanvo rahbehna hrang hrang tuar te tan complain thehluhte ngaihthlakna hun neih a ni a. Complaint hi Deputy Commissioner, Superintendent of Police, District Programme Officer, Women & Child Development Department leh Child Development Project Officer (CDPO), Women & Child Development Department te hnena thehluh niin, inchhungkhur leh hnathawhna hmuna hleihlenna hmeichhiate chunga eng kawng pawha harsatna tawk te, nupa kara harsatna avanga hmeichhe chunga tawrhna thlengte, chhaih nawmnah tawkte leh eng kawng pawha hmeichhia nihna avanga hleihlenna leh nek chepna tawkte’n harsatna an thlen a ni.

He hunah hian, Pi T. Lalnuntluangi, OC, Khawzawl Police Station, Pi Esther Laltlinpuii, CDPO, Khawzawl ICDS Project bakah MHIP Sub- Hqrs OB’s, ICDS staff , Anganwadi Worker (AWW) & Anganwadi Helper (AWH) Khawzawl te leh OSC staff te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Serchhipah DWSM meeting neih a ni
content:
4781/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 11th March, 2026:Ni 11.03.2026 Nilaini chhun Dar 12:00 khan Serchhip District Water & Sanitation Mission meeting neih a ni a, meeting hi Serchhip DC Pu Paul L. Khuma’n a kaihruai.

Er. Isaac Lalchhuanmawia, Member Secretary chuan agenda te sawifiahin hmalakna report hrang hrang te a tarlanga Jal Mahotsav chungchang sawi in he campaign hi 8-22 March, 2026 chhunga hman tur a nih thu a sawi a, he mi Program hnuaia hmalakna tur hrang hrang zingah Jal Arpan Diwas chu 12.03.2026 hian Hmawngkawn khuaa hman tum a nih thu te sawiin Committee chuan a pawmpui nghal a ni.

Paul L. Khuma, Chairman/DC chuan Jal Mahotsav hawnna nei zui nghalin, he campaign chhunga hmalakna tur ruahman te a theih ang anga zawm turin member-te a sawm a. PHE Department hmalakna hrang hrangte chhunawm a tih thu an inpekna fakawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

Er. Isaac Lalchhuanmawia chuan District Technical Unit din a nih thu te leh an hmalakna khaw tinin Jal Seva Aankalan kaltlanga village Self- assessment an tih an lo check tawh dan leh issue hrang hrang an neih te tarlangin heng an harsatna neih chhan leh a chin fel dan tur ruahmanna District Improvement Plan an siam te PowerPoint presentation hmangin a tarlang a. Member kalkhawmte chuan District Improvement Plan hi District Technical Unit (DTU) lam hian kimchang leh zual zawkin lo buatsaih se tiin an rel a ni.

11.03.2026 hi World Plumber Day a nih angin  a puala hun hman zui nghal a ni a, PHE Department hnuaia Plumber mi 9 te hnenah thilpek an hlan a ni.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM STATE MEDICINAL PLANTS BOARD LEH KVK TANGKAWPIN KOLASIB-AH AWARENESS PROGRAMME HMANG
content:
4780/2025-2026

Kolasib, 11th March, 2026:Vawiin chhun dar 11:00 khan State Medicinal Plant Board (SMPB), Mizoram (Under Nucleus Centre Grant, National Medicinal Plant Board, Ministry of AYUSH) leh Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK), Kolasib tangkawp buatsaihin KVK Kolasib-ah tualto ramhmul damdawi chin pun dan leh enkawl dan chungchangah kuthnathawktute pualin in zirtirna (Awareness Programme) hlawhtling taka neih a ni. He hunah hian Kolasib district chhung khaw hrang hrang 11 atangin loneitu (farmers) thahnem tak an tel a ni.

He hun hi Dr. Michelle C. Lallawmkimi, Senior Scientist & Head, KVK Kolasib chuan kaihruaiin kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Dr. C. Vanlalhlimpuia, District Medical Officer cum Senior Medical Officer (AYUSH), District Hospital Kolasib chuan thu sawiin, SMPB hmalakna hrang hrangte a tarlang a. Kalkhawmte chu SMPB hmang tangkai zual deuh deuh tur leh, ramhmul damdawi chungchanga hriat belh duh neite tan KVK Kolasib leh Department of AYUSH, District Hospital, Kolasib te be pawh a, rawn thin turin a chah bawk a ni.

He programme-ah hian mithiam ruat bik, Dr. Lalchhanhimi, Consultant (Botany) leh Dr. Lalrammuana Sailo, Consultant (Medicinal Plant), SMPB, Mizoram, Directorate of AYUSH te chuan Mizorama ramhmul damdawi pawimawh zualte chanchin leh hetiang lama project neih theih dante zirtirna an pe a. Zirtirna pek a nih hnu hian kuthnathawktu kalkhawmte nen inpawh tlang takin sawihona hun an nei nghal a ni. He hun hi Dr. Carolyn Zothansiami (SMS, Soil Science) chuan lawmthu sawina (vote of thanks) neiin a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: CHAPCHAR KUT 2026 ART & PHOTO EXHIBITION HAWN A NI
content:
4779/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 11th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Pi Betsy Zothanpari Sailo, Secretary, Information & Public Relations, Printing & Stationery (IPRP&S) Department chuan Vanapa Hall-ah Directorate of Information & Public Relations (I&PR), Mizoram Art Development Society (MADS) leh Mizo Photographers’ Society (MPS)-te buatsaih, ni thum awh tur Chapchar Kut 2026 puala lemziak leh thlalak phochhuah runpui, Art & Photo Exhibition chu khuallian niin a hawng.

Khuallian Pi Betsy Zothanpari Sailo chuan lemziak mite leh thlalatute hmalakna chu chhuanawm a tih thu sawiin, an thawhrimna a fak a. Lem ziah leh thla lak chu mi nazawng tih chi a ni lova, talent neih that a ngai a, an ngaihtuahna leh rilru put hmangte an themthiamna hmanga an phochhuak thiam chu entu mipuite pawhin ngun taka an thlir a, an ngaihhlutsak zual zel a, anni pawhin hlawhtlinna sang zawk an chan zel a beisei thu a sawi a ni.

Hawnna hunah hian Pi Carol VLMS Dawngkimi, Director, Art & Culture Department leh I&PR officer leh staff-te bakah MADS leh MPS member-te an tel a. Pi K. Vanlalsangi, Director, I&PR-in kaihruaiin, inlawmna thu a sawi a. Chapchar Kut puala Painting Exhibition chu kum 2012 atanga neih tan a ni a, Photography Exhibition pawh kum 2016 atanga neih chhoh a ni tih sawiin, MADS leh MPS-te inpekna chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. MADS President Pu Vanlalhriata leh MPS President Pu Zoramchhana-te’n an pawl hmalaknate an tarlang a. Pu Pratap Chhetri, Deputy Director, I&PR-in lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Chapchar Kut 2026 Art & Photo Exhibition hian vawiin, March ni 11, 2026 atanga March ni 13, 2026 thleng a awh dawn a. Tlawhtute’n lemziak leh thlalak phochhuahte hi an lei thei dawn a. MADS chuan hemi pual hian ‘Zozia’ tih thupui hmangin Art Camp an lo buatsaih tawh a, member 68-te an tel a. Exhibition-ah hian a vaiin lemziak leh thilsiam 107 phochhuah a ni a, chu’ng zingah chuan Pencil/Charcoal hmanga ziah 5; Mixed Media 3; Sculpture 3; Watercolour hmanga ziah 13; Acrylic hmanga ziah 80 leh Oil Painting 3 a tel a ni. MPS-te’n mi 39-te thlalak thehluh atanga thlanchhuah thlalak 126 an phochhuak bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Serchhip District level PDNA Survey Team thukhawm
content:
4778/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 11th March, 2026:Serchhip DC Pu Paul L Khuma hoin vawiiin khan Serchhip DC Meeting Hall ah District Level Post Disaster Needs Assessment (PDNA) team te nen meeting neih a ni.

Disaster Management & Rehabilitation bultumin Post Disaster Needs Assessment hnuaiah kum 2021 atanga kum 2026 inkara chhiatna hrang hrang District chhunga thleng te data lak khawm a ni a. Chung data te chu district tinah sem chhuah leh niin, heng te hi an kaihhnawih department theuh ten a hmunah a dik ngei em tih finfiah nan an endik (verify) vek dawn a. He verification atan hian Serchhip District Survey Team for PDNA din a ni a. Vawiin meeting-ah hian team member te hi koh khawm niin, an hmalak dan tur inhrilhhriatna hun an hmang a ni.

Meeting-ah hian DC chuan district chhunga chhiatna thleng te dik tak leh felfai taka chhinchhiah a pawimawhzia a sawi a. Team member te chu anmahni department aiawhin thahnemngai taka thawk chhuak turin a fuih a, data dik leh rintlak qn lakkhawm te hi chhiatna thleng hmachhawn dan tur Disaster Plan siam nan a tangkai hle dawn a ni, a ti.

Meetingah hian P&E, Agriculture, CMO, PHE, PWD, RD, Horticulture, Irrigation, AH & Vety, Fisheries Department aiawhte te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: SIAHAAH HMEICHHIATE THU THLEN NGAIHTHLAKNA HUN MAHILA JANSUNWAI (PUBLIC HEARING) HMAN A NI
content:
4777/2025-2026

Dated Siaha, the 11 March, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00AM khan District Rural Resource Centre, DRDO office Siahaah International Women's Day pualin ‘Hmeichhiate thu thlen ngaihthlakna hun’ “Mahila Jan Sunwai” (Public Hearings) hman a ni a, he hun hi Pi Vanlalhlupuii Fanai, Member, Mizoram State Commission for Women chuan kaihruaiin, Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte, District bawrhsap chuan a hmanpui bawk.

Pi Vanlalhlupuii Fanai chuan hun hlu tak senga kal khawmte lawmna thu sawiin, ‘sawrkar laipui hian hmeichhiate a ngaihsakin a humhalh ṭha em em a, chuvangin rampum huap commission a din bakah state leh UT tina din turin hriattirna a tichhuak a. India danpui bakah dantesep hrang hrangah hmeichhiate chungchang tarlanna siamṭhat ngai lai a awm em, hmeichhiate humhalhna ṭha taka kalpui a ni em tih uluk takin a ngaihven reng ṭhin a ni,’ a ti. Mizoram state commission for Women hmalakna tlangpui Pi Vanlalhlupuii Fanai hian tarlangin, nikum thleng khan thubuai (case) 143 chinfel ni tawhin, Aizawl khawpui pawn - Lawngtlai, Lunglei leh Champhai aṭangin mi pakhat ṭheuh Mizoram state commission for Women-ah telh an ni a, hei hian hmalakna a tichakin a ṭangkai em em a ni,’ a ti bawk.

Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte, District bawrhsap pawhin thu sawiin, ‘Hmeichhiate hmakhua ngaia thawktu district chhunga awm zawng zawngte hmalakna fakawm a tiin, an hmalakna avangin mi tam takin hahdamna an chan a rin thu a sawi.’ Dan anga kalpuia hmalak theihna thil a tam tawh thu District bawrhsap hian sawiin, chutih rualin mi pakhat dikna chanvo a vawng lurh bik chuan a dik lo va, mi zawng zawng dikna chanvo inzahsaka inhriatthiam tawn hian nunho a nuamin khawtlang leh ram nuam tak kan siam thei dawn a ni, a ti.

Mizoram State Commission for Women, Deputy Commissioner Office, Superintendent of Police Office, leh hmeichhiate hmakhua ngaia thawktute ṭangho buatsaih Mahila Jansunwai (Public Hearing)-ah hian department official bakah tlawmngai pawl aiawh leh khawtlang hruaitute an tel a. Thubuai (case) pahnih ngaituah niin, an harsatna thlente hi chinfel dan kawng zawn sakin a ṭul anga hmalakpui a ni.

Attachment

title: Saitual District-a Tung chingte hnenah a chi sem a ni
content:
4776/2025-2026

Saitual, the 11th March, 2026:Vawiin khan District Agriculture Office, Keifangah, Pi Hmangaihthangi Renthlei, DAO kaihhruainain Tung chi semna hun hman a ni a, Saitual Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi chu khuallian niin Tung chi semna hun a hawng nghal a ni.

He hunah hian khuallian Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan thu a sawi a, Tung chu Saitual District-a a awm hnuah chiah a hriat thu sawiin, August ni 4, 2024-a din Saitual District Tung Grower Association chu Association la naupang tak ni chunga hma ṭha taka an la thei chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

Khuallian chuan Tung chingtute chu DAO kaltlangin an harsatna leh mamawhnate thlen thin turin a chah a, sawrkar lam atangin pui tura an inhawn reng thu sawiin, an kal lehzelna turah duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk a ni.

October ni 8, 2022 khan Saitual Tung Grower Association din a ni a, April ni 29, 2023 khan RZ Foundation kaltlangin Galaxy surfactant limited Mumbai te nen kum 3 atan inremna ziah a ni. District chhunga khaw dangte huap zau zawk turin Saitual District Tung Grower Association chu August ni 4, 2024 khan din a lo ni ta a ni.

Tung hriak hi bungrua (furniture) tih tletna atan te, varnish, paints leh leather tih tletna atan te leh thil dang hrang hrangah an hmang nasa hle a, chin a nih atanga kum 3 bawr velah an rah tan thei a, kum 30 bawr vel thleng an rah thei a ni.

Vawiin Tung chi semna inkhawm hi Pi Hmangaihthangi Renthlei, DAO chuan a kai hruai a, Saitual Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi chu khuallian niin thu a sawi nghal a ni. Saitual Tung Grower Association atangin report tawi ngaihthlak a ni a, Pu Lalchhuanawma, ADAO chuan lawmthu sawinain hun a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: SANGAUAH AWARENESS CAMPAIGN ON FIRE PREVENTION, 2026  HMAN A NI
content:
4775/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, the 11th March, 2026 :Vawiin chawhma dar 10: 00 AM khan 'District Level Committee On Fire Prevention Lawngtlai' buatsaihin 'Awareness Programme on Fire Prevention' chu BDO Hall, Sangauah hman a ni am Lawngtlai Bawrhsap leh Chairman, District Level Committee on Fire Prevention ni bawk Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan a hmanpui a .Pu HC.Lalengkima, EM, i/c EF & CC, etc. LADC chu khuallian a ni.

Khuallian chuan Deputy Commissioner kaihruiana hnuaia Lawngtlai District Level Committee on Fire Prevention- hmalakna fakawm a tih thu a sawi a. Ram kangin nghawng a neih thui zia hriaa kangmei tichhuaklo tura hmalak chu a pawimawh hle a tim a pawi zia kan hria a, a pawi em em a ni. Sawrkarlaipuiin ram kang hi a ngai thutakin a ngaipawimawh hle a, ram leilung fate tan phei chuan theihtawp chhuah tur kan ni a ti. EM chuan keimahni tan chauh ni loin thangthar lo awm leh zel tur tan ramngaw tha tak Kan siamsak a tul hle a, ram nuam leh chhenfakawm siam turin tan i la tlang ang u tiin a sawm a ni.

Pu HC.Lalengkima, EM, i/c EF & CC, etc chuan kangmei tichhuak lo turin inzirtirna chak zawka kalpui a tul hle a ti a. A bik takin Mizoram tihming thatu Phawngpui tlang kang thin veiawm a tih thu tarlangin kuminah kangmei laka a fihlim theih nan a chheh vela khua awmte tan la sauh sauh turin a fuih a. e pawh a kan lohna turin kan fimkhur a ngai a ni. Forest Department - te kutah engkim dah a thianglo a, mi tin hian kangmei chhuak lo tura tan la turin a fuih a ni. Kangmei tichhuaktu ni lo tur leh kangmei chhuak thelhtu ni theuh turin kalkhawmte a sawm nghal a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan sawrkar mi leh sa, NGOs, VCs leh mipui kalkhawm te chibai bukna a nei hmasa a. Kangmei in kan Environment, Ramngaw leh tuitlan a ti chhe nasa hle a, kangmei venna kawngah tan lak thar a ngai hle a ni, a ti. Nikum lam District in elnaah kangmei tichhuak nasa ber District kan ni a, tih tur hmabak kan ngah hle a, chak zawka hmalak a tul thu a sawi. Lawngtlai district chu ADC pahnih nei a ni chungin, kangmei venna kawngah a ti tha ber ni tur a theih tawp chhuah mek a ni, a ti. Bawrhsap chuan VC, NGO leh chhungkua anga tih tur a awm thu tarlangin kangmei tichhuak tute man chhuah a, an phu tawk hremna pek a ngai a, Sawrkarin khapna(Order) a tih chhuah pawh khauh taka kalpui tum a nih thu a tarlang. Kangmei vennaah sawrkar leh Department kutah engkim dah theih a nih lo thu sawiin,thawhpuiah mipuite a sawm a. turin a sawm thar leh a ni. Lawngtlai District- timawia, tihmasawn turin mitinin mawhphurhna an nei tiin theihtawp chhuah turin a fuih a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan Foreigner chungchang sawiin, harsatna tawh mekte uluk taka ngaihtuah a tul hle a ti am ngai a nia ti a. Khawpui chhungah tute nge hriat loh an tam em em a, tun atanga vei leh hmalak a nih loh chuan nakin zelah buaina lian zawk a awm thei tih sawiin, District Administration - leh LADC lam ten hma an lak reng thu a sawi. Foreigner lut leh chuak leh sumdawnna kawngah Siaha District nen tangkawpa Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) duang mek a nih thu leh kalpui thuai a nih tur thu a tarlang a ni.

Ruihhlo chungchang sawiin, Bawrhsap chuan ruihhlo in min luhchhuah nasa em em a, Lawngtlai District- ah ruihhlo lut leh chhuak theihtawp a dan a ni lh thu a tarlang a. Lawngtlai District- ah Project thar leh tha em em tur "Drugs Free District" tih hmangin April thla atangin ruihhlo Do kalpui a nih dawn thu a sawi. Ruihhlo Do turin Sawrkar, VC leh NGO - te an che chhuak mek zel tih tarlangin, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan thawhhona tha tak nen Ruihhlo tihrem thuai a nih a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

He hun hi Pu K.Lalromawia, DCCF, LADC & Member Secretary, District Level Committee on Fire Prevention, Lawngtlai District in kaihhruaiin, Pu Marcellas Hunlawmawma, Deputy Conservator of Forest, Chhimtuipui Wildlife Division,chuan power point presentation  a pe a,  Pu Thomas Maratha  Hlychho, BDO, Sangau RD Block chuan lawmthu sawina  neiin hun khar.

Attachment

title: NORTH EASTERN REGIONAL POWER COMMITTEE HNUAIA TECHNICAL COORDINATION COMMITTEE MEETING VAWI 31-NA MIZORAM-AH NEIH A NI
content:
4774/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 11th March, 2026 :Vawiin khan North Eastern Regional Power Committee (NERPC) hnuaia Technical Coordination Committee (TCC) Meeting vawi 31-na chu KTP Youth Resource Centre, Falkland-ah NEIH a ni a. He meeting hi Er. J.H. Malsawma, Engineer-in-Chief, Power & Electric Department chuan a kaihruai.

Pi Pansngiat Sun, Chairman, TCC chuan ram mawi leh nuam tak Mizorama TCC leh NERPC meeting an nei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Renewable energy lamah mahni kan intodelha hma kan sawn zel a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Kalkhawmte chu power sector-a kan than zel theih nan an ngaihtuahna senga, sawihona hlawkthlak tak nei turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Hun kaihruaitu Er. J.H. Malsawma pawhin thusawiin, Mizoram mawina an rawn hmu ve thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Kawlpetha hi kawng tinrenga hmasawnna atana thil pawimawh hmasa berte zinga mi a nih avangin power sector-a hma kan sawn zel nan he TCC meeting hi a pawimawh em em a ni, a ti a. Sawihona tha tak neih a nih theih nan leh North-east state-te tan hmasawnna duhawm tak a thlen ngei theih nan duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Vawin thutkhawmah hian NER member-te power sector-a tunlai thamna leh khawl chhuakthar lama zirna neih tur chungchangte, chatlak lova kawlphetha kan neih theih dan turte, North Eastern Region-a Power lama thawhhona tha zawk neih dan turte, harsatna kan tawh mek leh a sutkian dan turte sawi ho a ni.

TCC meeting hi India North East region-a power sector-a organization hrang hrangte inkawmkhawmna niin, North-East region-a power sector kalphung siamthatna leh grid operation ṭha zawk siam nan hma lakna pawimawh tak a ni. Kumin NERPC leh TCC meeting hi Power & Electricity Department, Government of Mizoram in a thleng a. NE State hrang hrang atangin Utilities/Company/organization 25 he an tel a ni.

Naktuk March ni 12, 2026 hian North Eastern Region Power Committee (NERPC) chu YRC-ah an thukhawm dawn a. He thutkhawmah hian NE State Power Minister zawng zawng tel tura beisei an nih laiin Assembly Session neih mekte avangin, member rawn kal thei lo tur an awm nual a ni.

Attachment
